note: Cross-model Codex MCP reviewer unavailable; audit performed by same agent following the checklist

gt_provenance.details: All evaluations are simulation_only — mathematical models (radar equation, ITU-R propagation). No fake GT from model outputs.

score_normalization.details: ECR uses raw binary decisions. J_min is raw physical quantity. J_max_ref is externally estimated per experiment, not from solution statistics.

result_existence.details: Legacy paper/sections/ numbers mismatch current experiments. No structured JSON saved for experiment_paper_aligned and experiment_challenging (stdout only). tune_results.json exists and is valid.

dead_code.details: generate_boundary_task_points, calculate_boundary_ecr, path_loss_air_to_ground, path_loss_ground_to_ground, calculate_jamming_power declared but never called. Utility functions, not fraudulent.

scope.details: 2 scenarios tested, single seed per config. No error bars. Missing 100km² basic scenario from legacy claims. Acceptable for undergraduate thesis.

claims.claim: 空地异构传播模型提高准确性
